nasb.text: For it is written, “I will destroy the wisdom of the wise, And the cleverness of the clever I will set aside.”

esv.text: For it is written, “I will destroy the wisdom of the wise, and the discernment of the discerning I will thwart.”

cnv.text: 因為經上記著說： “我要滅絕智慧人的智慧， 廢棄聰明人的聰明。”

ccb.text: 正如圣经上说：“我要摧毁智者的智慧，废弃明哲的聪明。”

csbs.text: 因为经上记着： “我将要毁灭智慧人的智慧， 废弃聪明人的聪明。”
